title: palicourea cuatrecasasii
intro: Palicourea cuatrecasasii, also known as the Quatrecasas' palicourea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Palicourea cuatrecasasii include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions, among others. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts may also be used in the production of supplements or topical creams.
